hero.title: Kamara Selection
hero.subtitle: Premium Gemstones from Sri Lanka
hero.description: Discover the finest gemstones directly from the mines of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka's legendary gem capital

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a family-owned gem business with mines located in the heart of Rathnapura, Sri Lanka. Known as the 'City of Gems', Rathnapura has been producing some of the world's finest gemstones for centuries. Our expertise spans generations, ensuring you receive only the highest quality precious stones.
about.qualityDesc: Hand-selected gems from our own mines

gemstones.subtitle: Explore our exquisite collection of Sri Lankan gemstones
